title: APF Paper 5 — Quantum Structure from Finite Enforceability
description:
Hilbert space structure, Born rule, tensor products, CPTP formalism, measurement structure as derived from finite enforceability. Draft .tex (664 lines, v1.0) extant; PLEC propagation pending.

This repository is the executable mathematical appendix for Paper 5 of the Admissibility Physics Framework (APF). All theorems trace to named check functions in the bundled apf/ package.

creators.name: Brooke, Ethan
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, San Anselmo, California, USA
